The '''Heavy Tracker 16''' was a thick-barreled [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] produced by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]].

==Description==
Manufactured by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]], the Heavy Tracker 16 was a thick-barrelled [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] with built-in stock, weighing a hefty six [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]].<ref name="AEG" /> The weapon had a range of three hundred [[Meter/Legends|meters]],<ref name="RASB2" /> and cost between a thousand<ref name="RASB" /> and one thousand one hundred [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] apiece. The Heavy Tracker 16 was similar in design to the [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]],<ref name="AEG" /> although it was not as reliable or versatile.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|31|Heavy Tracker 16"}}</ref>

==History==
Like many SoroSuub designs, the Heavy Tracker 16 was originally licensed from another company. The Heavy Tracker 16 was licensed from [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]], and the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] modified the design, fixing what they perceived were flaws with the original designs.<ref name="AEG" />

The Heavy Tracker 16 was a tough, durable weapon which was favored by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and various militias and insurrectionists, where it performed well in a wilderness environment.<ref name="AEG" /> It merits, however, meant that it was generally unsuitable for deployment with [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police forces]].<ref name="CSWE" />
